case_title: LAWRENCE H. SHANE VS. RONALD BROWN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANE, LAWRENCE H.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE AND REQUEST TO RESET THE TRIAL DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANE, LAWRENCE H.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHANE, LAWRENCE H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, RONALD $2,135.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,245.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM EDWARD HOLTZ FILED BY SHANE, LAWRENCE H. BROWN, RONALD

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2008 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-04-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT ORDERED TO APPEAR PERSONALLY WITH ALL FINANCIAL DOCUMENTS, INCLUDING BANK STATEMENTS, PAY STUBS, AND OTHER INFORMATION CONCERNING INCOME, ASSETS, EXPENSES, AND DEBT. IF DEFENDNAT DOES NOT APPEAR AND/OR DOES NOT BRING DOCUMENTATION AS ORDERED, THE COURT WILL ISSUE A MANDATORY SANCTION AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE SUM OF $500.00. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-08-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-03-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
